models.name: gpt-oss
models.description: OpenAI’s open-weight models designed for powerful reasoning, agentic tasks, and versatile developer use cases.

models.name: deepseek-r1
models.description: DeepSeek-R1 is a family of open reasoning models with performance approaching that of leading models, such as O3 and Gemini 2.5 Pro.

models.name: gemma3
models.description: The current, most capable model that runs on a single GPU.

models.name: qwen3
models.description: Latest generation of Qwen3 series models, dense and MoE models.

models.name: LLaMA 3.1
models.description: LLaMA 3.1 is a state-of-the-art model by Meta available in 8B, 70B, and 405B parameter sizes with up to 128K context length.

models.name: Llama-3.2-1B-Instruct
models.description: A 1B parameter instruction-tuned model from Meta’s Llama 3.2 family, designed for lightweight reasoning and dialogue.

models.name: Mistral-7B
models.description: The 7B instruct models released by Mistral AI, updated to v0.3, supporting 32K context.

models.name: Qwen2.5
models.description: The Qwen2.5 instruct models released by Alibaba, supporting up to 128K context and multilingual usage.

models.name: Llama3
models.description: Meta Llama 3 model family (8B and 70B) with instruct and text variants, multiple quantization formats (q2–q8, fp16). Context up to 8K.

models.name: LLaVA
models.description: LLaVA multimodal model family (7B, 13B, 34B) with vision + language capabilities and multiple quantization formats (q2–q8, fp16, vicuna, mistral). Context up to 32K.

models.name: Gemma 2
models.description: Google Gemma 2 is a high-performing and efficient model available in three sizes: 2B, 9B, and 27B.

models.name: Qwen2.5-Coder
models.description: Qwen2.5-Coder is a series of code-specialized models optimized for code generation, reasoning, and fixing, available in multiple sizes from 0.5B to 32B parameters.

models.name: Gemma
models.description: Gemma is a family of lightweight, state-of-the-art open models built by Google DeepMind. Updated to version 1.1

models.name: Phi-4
models.description: Phi-4 is a 14B parameter, state-of-the-art open model from Microsoft.

models.name: Qwen
models.description: Qwen 1.5 is a series of large language models by Alibaba Cloud spanning from 0.5B to 110B parameters.

models.name: Qwen2
models.description: Qwen2 is a series of large language models from Alibaba Group, ranging from 0.5B to 72B parameters, with text and instruct variants.

models.name: Llama2
models.description: Llama 2 is a collection of foundation language models ranging from 7B to 70B parameters, with chat and text variants, multiple quantization formats (q2–q8, fp16). Context up to 4K.

models.name: CodeLlama
models.description: A large language model that can use text prompts to generate and discuss code, available in multiple sizes (7B, 13B, 34B, 70B) with up to 16K context for some models.

models.name: Dolphin3
models.description: Dolphin 3.0 (Llama 3.1 8B) is the next generation of the Dolphin series of instruct-tuned models, designed for coding, math, agentic tasks, function calling, and general use cases, with context up to 128K.

models.name: TinyLlama
models.description: The TinyLlama project is an open endeavor to train a compact 1.1B Llama model on 3 trillion tokens.

models.name: Olmo2
models.description: OLMo 2 is a new family of 7B and 13B models trained on up to 5T tokens. These models are on par with or better than equivalently sized fully open models, and competitive with open-weight models such as Llama 3.1 on English academic benchmarks. Includes instruct-tuned variants and multiple quantization formats (q4, q8, fp16) with context up to 4K.

models.name: Mistral-Nemo
models.description: A state-of-the-art 12B model with 128k context length, built by Mistral AI in collaboration with NVIDIA. Includes instruct-tuned and quantized variants (q2–q8, fp16).

models.name: Llama3.2-Vision
models.description: Llama 3.2 Vision is a collection of instruction-tuned image reasoning generative models in 11B and 90B sizes, supporting text and image input with 128K context. Includes quantized and fp16 variants.

models.name: Llama3.3
models.description: Llama 3.3 is a new state-of-the-art 70B model offering similar performance compared to Llama 3.1 405B, with instruction-tuned variants and quantized/fp16 options. Context up to 128K tokens.

models.name: DeepSeek-V3
models.description: DeepSeek V3 is a Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) language model with 671B total parameters, 37B activated per token, supporting ultra-long context lengths up to 160K tokens.

models.name: BGE-M3
models.description: BGE-M3 is a versatile model from BAAI, designed for multi-functionality, multi-linguality, and multi-granularity, with embedding capabilities.

models.name: Mistral Small
models.description: Mistral Small 3 sets a benchmark in the small LLM category below 70B, with multiple quantized and fp16 variants.

models.name: SmolLM2
models.description: SmolLM2 is a family of compact language models available in 135M, 360M, and 1.7B parameters, with multiple quantized and fp16 variants.

models.name: LLaVA-Llama3
models.description: A LLaVA model fine-tuned from Llama 3 Instruct with better scores in several benchmarks, supporting text and image inputs.

models.name: QwQ
models.description: QwQ is the reasoning model of the Qwen series.

models.name: All-MiniLM
models.description: Embedding models trained on very large sentence-level datasets.

models.name: Mixtral
models.description: A set of Mixture of Experts (MoE) models with open weights by Mistral AI, available in 8x7B and 8x22B parameter sizes.

models.name: DeepSeek-Coder
models.description: DeepSeek Coder is a capable coding model trained on two trillion code and natural language tokens, available in 1.3B, 6.7B.

models.name: StarCoder2
models.description: StarCoder2 is the next generation of transparently trained open code LLMs that comes in three sizes: 3B, 7B, and 15B parameters.

models.name: DeepSeek-Coder-V2
models.description: An open-source Mixture-of-Experts code language model that achieves performance comparable to GPT4-Turbo in code-specific tasks.

models.name: Phi-2
models.description: A 2.7B language model by Microsoft Research that demonstrates outstanding reasoning and language understanding capabilities.

embedding_models.name: mxbai-embed-large
embedding_models.description: State-of-the-art large embedding model from mixedbread.ai (334M parameters)

embedding_models.name: nomic-embed-text
embedding_models.description: A high-performing open embedding model with a large token context window (137M parameters)

embedding_models.name: all-minilm
embedding_models.description: Embedding models trained on very large sentence level datasets (22M - 33M parameters)

embedding_models.name: bge-m3
embedding_models.description: BGE-M3 is a versatile model from BAAI, designed for multi-functionality, multi-linguality, and multi-granularity
